content: I need to perform a genome annotation of the samples I got and evaluate the quality of the annotation. The inputs that I have are FASTA files for genome, protein and some auxiliary datasets to perfrom the analysis. All files are in the benchmark/datasets/local/experiment_8 directory. Run the tools in Galaxy necessary to achieve the two goals setted. Use S_pombe_chrIII_genome.fasta, S_pombe_trinity_assembly.fasta, Swissprot_no_S_pombe.fasta, snap_training.snaphmm, augustus_training.tar.gz.augustus. Balance guidance with room for informed defaults. Prefer this guidance when available: genome annotation, annotation quality evaluation. Return structured outputs for annotation_quality_tool, workflow_step_count, visualization_tool.
